mapper.sql: select status_log_id, request_id, student_user_id, student_name, student_no, before_status_code, before_status_name, after_status_code, after_status_name, business_code, business_name, effective_date, detail_json, operator_user_id, operator_name, create_time, remark from sc_student_status_log
mapper.insert: insert into sc_student_status_log (request_id, student_user_id, student_name, student_no, before_status_code, before_status_name, after_status_code, after_status_name, business_code, business_name, effective_date, detail_json, operator_user_id, operator_name, create_time, remark) values (#{requestId}, #{studentUserId}, #{studentName}, #{studentNo}, #{beforeStatusCode}, #{beforeStatusName}, #{afterStatusCode}, #{afterStatusName}, #{businessCode}, #{businessName}, #{effectiveDate}, #{detailJson}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate(), #{remark})
